description: Official LaTeX template for the International Symposium on Quantum Computing and Musical Creativity (ISQCMC) 2025. Provides two-column A4 formatting, double-blind anonymization support via redacted author/affiliation blocks, multi-institution author tagging with email formatting, and a custom syntax-highlighted code listing style with a bundled OPENQASM language definition, based on a custom isqcmc2025 style file derived from the SBCM template lineage.
